title: Enterprise Systems Landscape
description: Interactive hub-and-spoke landscape of enterprise systems with ERP as the system of record, surrounded by CRM, SCM, HRIS, Payroll, Procurement, and BI satellites with integration patterns and a best-of-breed toggle.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Information Systems
Enterprise Systems
ERP
Integration
learningObjectives: Name the major enterprise system categories
Identify ERP as the system-of-record hub
Articulate why integration complexity grows with the number of systems
Distinguish real-time, batch, and event-stream integration patterns

controls.description: Click for vendor and integration details

assumptions: ERP at the center is the dominant pattern; alternatives exist
limitations: Does not show vertical-specific systems (MES, EHR, LIMS)
